name: Kasseri, Tomato and Basil Cresents (Kasseropi
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend warm water, olive oil, red wine vinegar, and egg. Gradually stir in enough flour so that the dough pulls away from the sides of the bowl.
2. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes.
3. Shape the dough into a round. Grease a bowl.
4. Add the dough to the greased bowl, turning to coat the surface. Cover with a damp towel and let stand in a warm, draft-free area for 30 minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease baking sheets.
6. In a bowl, combine Kasseri cheese, chopped tomatoes, and fresh basil.
7. Divide the dough into 8 pieces. Shape each piece into a smooth round.
8. Roll each round on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 1/4 to 1/8 inch.
9. Spoon some of the cheese mixture down the center of each round. Fold one side over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
10. Arrange the cresents on the prepared baking sheets. Sprinkle with paprika.
11. Bake until the cheese has melted and the pastry is golden brown, about 40 minutes. Serve hot.
